title: fix(auth): token refresh race on parallel tabs
body: Two browser tabs opened in quick succession both fire /auth/refresh concurrently. Only one request carries a valid rotation target; the second gets a 401 and logs the user out. Adding an in-memory mutex around the refresh path so only the first caller races Redis; subsequent callers await the same promise.

title: feat(webhooks): signed delivery retry on 5xx
body: When an outbound webhook gets a 5xx from the target, aiorch currently drops the delivery. This PR adds exponential backoff up to 5 retries with jitter. Config via new WEBHOOK_RETRY_ATTEMPTS env var (default 5).

title: docs: clarify SMTP connector TLS mode options
body: The connector form accepted tls_mode=starttls but docs only mentioned use_tls. Adding a table of valid values with examples for Gmail (starttls) vs SendGrid (starttls) vs raw (none).

title: perf(executor): batch stream flush on high-QPS runs
body: SSE stream writes 1 message per step_done. On pipelines firing 50+ steps/sec, this hits the event loop enough to show up on p99 latency graphs. Batching 20ms-windowed flushes cuts the overhead to ~15 percent of prior.

title: fix(scheduler): prevent duplicate fire on leader transition
body: When the scheduler's advisory lock transitions between replicas (e.g. rolling deploy), both old and new leaders briefly hold the lock for ~100ms. If a cron boundary falls in that window, the schedule can fire twice. Fix: capture last_fired_at as lock-acquisition time, not wall clock, so the second fire deduplicates.

title: feat(mcp): workspace-scoped MCP server enable/disable
body: Currently MCP servers are enabled org-wide. Adding per-workspace enable flag so one workspace can opt out without affecting others. New column workspace_mcp_servers.enabled (default true for BC).

title: fix(ui): dark-mode contrast on secondary buttons
body: User report: secondary button text is barely readable on dark background (#404040 on #2a2a2a = 2.1:1 contrast, below WCAG AA). Raising to #d4d4d4 for 11:1 ratio. Also fixing warning badge's amber on amber-muted.

title: refactor(storage): replace manual connection pool with asyncpg built-in
body: We have a hand-rolled connection pool in storage/postgres.py that predates asyncpg's create_pool being stable. Swapping to asyncpg.create_pool gets us proper health checks, automatic reconnection on network blip, and drops ~200 LOC.

title: feat(api): bulk archive endpoint for pipelines
body: UI already has a 'select multiple → archive' control but does it via N sequential DELETE calls. Adding POST /api/workspaces/{ws}/pipelines/archive-bulk that takes a list of names and processes them in one transaction.

title: security: redact api_key values in step_runs.params_json
body: audit step_runs rows currently log the full step params, which includes HTTP headers. When a pipeline has `action: http` with `headers: {Authorization: ...}`, the key lands in the DB. Fix: redact any key matching /authorization|api.?key|token|secret/i before persisting.
